body.title: [sprint] 2x2 confound experiment — {DS, aider} x {devstral, qwen} over the funnel
body.description:
**Problem:** Two confounds have poisoned every builder finding for months: (a) is the 0-edits wall a HARNESS gap or the MODEL below floor? and (b) has the model lever ever been priced? A 2x2 kills both in one experiment. (Fable review Draft A.)

**Proposed shape:** Run the sealed funnel set (T-funnel-as-ci) through 4 arms: {DS harness, aider} x {devstral-small-2:24b, qwen3-coder:30b}, optionally one Ollama Cloud arm. AIDER IS AN EXTERNAL DEPENDENCY — pip install aider-chat, headless (--message --yes), throwaway clone per run, OLLAMA_API_BASE pointed at Hex, RELATIVE paths only. NEVER vendored into unseen_university/ (Akien's constraint; T-aider-rack-device was cancelled — aider stays a black-box control arm, not a fork). Pre-register the decision rule via prereg.py: aider>DS on same model => harness gap is real (=> prioritize edit-format ladder / ACI); DS-qwen >> DS-devstral => per-role tiering is the lever; ALL arms fail => model is below floor (escalate tier / Ollama Cloud). Record every arm into the funnel scoreboard.

**Affected files:** new aider-arm wrapper (external CLI via subprocess — NO aider imports); the funnel runner from T-funnel-as-ci. MEDIUM inertia.
**Design rules:** No aider imports (subprocess only, per 'no non-portable deps' spirit); Inference-Proxy-only for the DS arms; the OpenAI-compatible proxy endpoint that would make aider's bytes land in io_corpus is a SEPARATE Phase-2 ticket (Stage 2) — this ticket may run aider as an un-instrumented black box.
**Scope boundary:** run the 2x2 + fill the scoreboard + record which confound resolved. Do NOT build AiderDevice (Phase 2, gated on aider winning here). Do NOT build the proxy endpoint here.
**Test plan:** Observation-shaped. Red-form: assert all 4 arms each produce a scoreboard row AND the prereg decision-rule record precedes the results (earliest-record firewall). shipped-unproven acceptable naming the lever = observation.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

**Completion criteria:**
- prereg.py decision-rule record precedes all results (firewall).
- All 4 arms {DS,aider}x{devstral,qwen} produce a scoreboard row over the sealed funnel set.
- aider ran as an EXTERNAL subprocess (no aider imports in unseen_university/) against a throwaway clone; 0 live-repo path refs in io_corpus for the aider arms.
- The filled 2x2 resolves which confound holds (harness-gap / tier-lever / model-floor) per the pre-registered rule, recorded in the results note.
body.intention: I intend that the harness-gap-vs-model-floor confound that has poisoned every builder finding for months is resolved by one controlled experiment — so subsequent loop work is aimed, not blind. Serves DS.0-leveling + the prior-art gate (aider as the control arm).
